temporal_scope: 1949-present; UN seat from 1971; Japan diplomatic relations from 1972
use_when: Use when the record clearly refers to the PRC government/state, including Japanese archival terms such as 中共.
source_terms_aliases: PRC; People's Republic of China; Communist China; Red China; Peking/Beijing Government; 中共; 中華人民共和国; 北京政府
notes: Preferred controlled term for 中共 in Japanese Cold War diplomatic records. Use CHN_AMBIG only when the intended China entity cannot be resolved.

temporal_scope: 1912-present; held UN China seat until 1971; Japan diplomatic relations until 1972
use_when: Use when the record refers to the ROC government, Nationalist China, or the Chinese Nationalist authorities.
source_terms_aliases: ROC; Republic of China; Nationalist China; Kuomintang Government; Chiang Kai-shek Government; Nationalist Government; 国府; 中華民国; 蒋介石政権; 台北政府
notes: Use for the ROC government/state actor. Often associated with Taiwan after 1949; use TWN separately for Taiwan as place, society, or territory.

use_when: Use for Taiwan as a place/society/economy, or when the record concerns Taiwan without necessarily referring to the ROC government as diplomatic actor.
source_terms_aliases: Taiwan; Formosa; 台湾; フォルモサ
notes: Use for Taiwan as place, society, territory, or the Taiwan question. Use ROC when the diplomatic actor is the Republic of China government.

preferred_label_jp: 中国代表権・承認競争
temporal_scope: Use especially for records on PRC-ROC/Taiwan competition over diplomatic recognition, state representation, or the China seat in the United Nations.
use_when: Use when a record concerns a transitional or contested situation in which PRC, ROC/Taiwan, or the China seat/representation cannot be treated as a single settled entity, especially in diplomatic recognition, normalization, or UN representation contexts.
source_terms_aliases: China; 中国; 中国代表権; 中国代表権問題; 中台国交樹立競争; 中台承認競争; China seat; Chinese representation; recognition competition
notes: Public label intentionally emphasizes contested representation and recognition competition, not mere data ambiguity. Do not use when the source clearly refers only to PRC or only to ROC/Taiwan.
